name: Admiral's Cummerbund
description: This white cloth belt has many silver buttons to clasp.
dropLocation: The Trouble with Tar Pits, end chest

name: Agarta's Belt
description: The belt of Agarta the Breaker, which retains a measure of her strength.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest

name: Agile Belt
description: This thin leather belt appears to be light and very easy to move in.
dropLocation: The Storehouse's Secret, End reward

name: Amara's Belt
description:
This fine leather belt is branded with patterns to appear to be on fire. It
was worn by Amara, a powerful Exorcist of the Silverflame.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Animated Rope
description: This rope seems to grip without you even needing to tie it.
dropLocation: Good Intentions, End chest

name: Ann Velsing's Belt
description:
Ann Velsing was a dedicated Hunter of the Dead. This plain leather belt granted
her aid in times of need.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 12)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gainthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, end chest (heroic normal); The Ruins of Gianthold chain end reward

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 13)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gainthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, End chest (Heroic Hard)

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 14)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gainthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, end chest (heroic elite)

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 23)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gianthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, end chest (epic normal); Return to Gianthold chain end reward

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 24)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gianthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, End chest (Epic Hard)

name: Arkat's Cord (Level 25)
description:
Found by a slain foe in Gianthold, this cloth belt's former owner is identified
by the name sewn into its lining.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, end chest (epic elite)

name: Awanahu Sash
description:
This darkened leather belt is well worn. The feared assassin, Awanahu, wore
this item when he slew a powerful member of the twelve.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Baron Aubrecker's Monogrammed Belt
description:
The monogramming on this belt looks elegant until you look at it closely, where
the rough edges betray it.
dropLocation: The Proper Authorities, end chest

name: Battlerager's Harness
description:
"If it moves, kill it."
- Maxim of the Kuldjargh
dropLocation: Temple of the Deathwyrm, Raid chest

name: Beast-leather Belt
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Belt of Blind Devotion
description: Bargain with blindness.
dropLocation: Violent Delights, end chest

name: Belt of Bold Brilliance
description:
A flashy, ostentatious belt of a Dwarven make. An inscription inside indicates
it may have been a gift.
dropLocation: The House of Gems, end chest

name: Belt of Braided Beards
description: Many devils were harmed in the making of this belt.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, Warded chest

name: Belt of Brutal Force
description: Brandish your brutality.
dropLocation: Caged Beast, End Chest

name: Belt of Brute Strength
description:
This leather strap cinches tight around the waist with a pair of thick straps.
It helps the wearer to perform feats of strength.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded Chest

name: Belt of Crystalline Vanity
description: A wrapped monument to your arrogance.
dropLocation: Total Chaos, end chest

name: Belt of Myriad Pockets
description:
One wonders where the items go when placed in the pockets... But they're always
there when you go to retrieve them.
dropLocation: Swim at Your Own Risk, end chest

name: Belt of Subtle Villainy
description: Share your subtlety.
dropLocation: The Bugbear Bandits, end chest

name: Belt of Sure Strikes
description: May you strike true!
dropLocation: Rosemary's Ballad, End chest

name: Belt of the Black Abishai
description: This belt seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

name: Belt of the Black Sands
description: The volcanic Black Sands of the Isle of Dread are rumored to have mystical properties.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest

name: Belt of the Blue Abishai
description: This belt seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

name: Belt of the Defenders of Siberys
description:
Once worn by the hero Vlor, this sturdy leather belt is sacred to the Defenders
of Siberys, and gives strength in times of need.
dropLocation: Genesis Point, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest
_file: Belt of the Defenders of Siberys.item

name: Belt of the Green Abishai
description: This belt seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

description:
This powerful belt is an ancient keepsake of the Mroranon Clan of the Ironroot
Mountains.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, Raid Warded Chest

name: Belt of the Ram
description: No shepard is necessary to guide your path.
dropLocation: The Thornwright, End chest

name: Belt of the Red Abishai
description: This belt seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

name: Belt of the Scoundrel
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Belt of the Scourge
description:
This belt bears an oddly-shaped, gray-and-gold-buckle formed of several pieces
of metal.
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Belt of the Seven Ideals (historic)
description:
This gaudy belt is adorned with seven faceted stones that span every color of
the rainbow. Surely they have magical as well as aesthetic properties.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, Black Dragon chest

name: Belt of the Seven Ideals (Level 12)
description:
This gaudy belt is adorned with seven faceted stones that span every color of
the rainbow. Surely they have magical as well as aesthetic properties.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, Black Dragon chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Belt of the Sun Soul
description:
The Order of the Sun Soul is a monastic order dedicated to the welfare of the
common folk of FaerÃ»n. This simple, braided cloth belt can help focus your
thoughts.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Villagers of Eveningstar Commendation: Villagers of Eveningstar : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Villagers of Eveningstar. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Belt of the White Abishai
description: This belt seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

name: Belt of the Wilds
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Belt of Thoughtful Rememberance
description:
This belt is said to protect the wielder from dark energies, and conjure images
of a soothing nature.
dropLocation: Flesh Maker's Laboratory, End Chest

name: Belt of Tongue
description:
The Black Abbot had Cholthulzz's tongue stretched and tied into a belt, a gruesome
but powerful garment.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Cholthulzz 's chest

name: Belt of Whirling Blades
description: This belt is patterned with the swirling, evil blades of Shavarath.
dropLocation: Three Paths to Battle, end chest

name: Belt of Wicked Insanity
description: Display your wickedness.
dropLocation: Treasure Hunt, end chest

name: Beltstrap of Forbidden Tomes
description:
Were the covers of the books that make up the strap truly too worn? Or were
they simply books too wreched for the weak to weather?
dropLocation: Unholy Defiler of the Hidden Hand, defiled version of Legendary Book-Cover Beltstrap

name: Black Dragonscale Tasset
description:
This belt is crafted out of Black Dragonscale, and carries an incredible ferocity
within.
dropLocation: Wake Me Up Inside, end chest

name: Black Satin Waist
description: It's definitely cursed.
dropLocation: The Magma Must Flow, End chest

name: Black Wolfskin Belt
description: This belt is fashioned from the pelt of a dark wolf-like beast.
dropLocation: Assault on Splinterskull, End reward

name: Blade-Barbed Bandolier
description: Pain and suffering. All must feel it, yours will be used to control it all.
dropLocation: Unholy Defiler of the Hidden Hand, defiled version of Legendary Bladesworn Bandolier

name: Bladesworn Bandolier
description: May the Lord of Blades' will be done.
dropLocation: The Bark and the Blade, End chest

name: Bloodknuckle's Loincloth Waistband
description:
This belt was once used to hold up the loincloth of the ogre Bloodknuckle. It
stinks of ogre.
dropLocation: The Kobolds' New Ringleader, Bloodknuckle 's Chest

name: Bolstered Bandolier
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Book-Cover Beltstrap
description:
The covers of books too damaged to remain in circulation were used to fashion
this strap. With it worn, you move like pages in the wind.
dropLocation: Vecna Unleashed (quest), End chest

name: Braided Cutcord
description: The braid of this belt is formed by sharpened wire.
dropLocation: The Final Vintage, End chest

name: Bronze Dragonscale Belt
description: This gleaming bronze belt contains powerful defensive magic.
dropLocation: Security Detail, End Chest

name: Bubble Belt
description:
Twisting a dial on this unusual belt's buckle causes the wearer to be surrounded
by a bubble of air.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Buckle of Assimilation
description:
What good is transformational power if it isn't used to create the world you
want?
dropLocation: Unholy Defiler of the Hidden Hand, defiled version of Legendary Buckle of Transformation

name: Buckle of Secrets
description:
This buckle conceals a small compartment, which could easily house small components,
hidden messages, or a small dose of poison.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, Lacheln 's chest (rare)

name: Buckle of Transformation
description:
When spun, this buckle releases its power into its bearer, granting them strength
and power.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Burnscar Sash
description: This belt is leather and has been branded with some unknown symbol.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Calitomes' Sash
description:
This finely embroidered azure sash was worn by the Air Savant, Calitomes, when
she journeyed to Shavarath to assist the Angelic Host.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any End Chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Cannith Crafted Belt
description: This is a Cannith crafted belt.

name: Chain of Manacles
description:
This belt is made of several interlocking pairs of magical manacles, each containing
their own subtle, lawful magic.
dropLocation: Eye Know Whodunnit, End chest

name: Chains
description: Oppression will always fail, just as chains will always be broken.
dropLocation: Slave Pits of the Undercity, Small chest

name: Chord of Reprisals
description:
This cloth cord belt appears to have flames dancing down its length. When struck,
this belt lashes out at the attacker with the intensity of the fires of hell.
dropLocation: Inferno of the Damned, end chest

name: Coin Belt
description:
A jangling string of coins worn about the waist. It's believed to confer good
luck onto the wearer.
dropLocation: The Abandoned Excavation, End reward

name: Colethenis's Belt
description:
This large leather belt is tattered and frayed. It once belonged to the feared
Ravager, Colenthis.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Component Carrier
description: Spell components are constantly spilling out of these pockets.
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Creation Forge Girdle
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Daggertooth's Belt (historic)
description:
This is the very belt that once held up Daggertooth of the Windlasher Gnoll's
armor. It is tattered and worn, but somehow still provides excellent support.
dropLocation: The Crucible, end chest

description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any legendary chest; or Dread saga legendary end reward

name: Direbear Belt
description:
This belt is made of Direbear hide, and can take quite a beating. Rumor has
it that some of the incredible ferocity of a Direbear can still be found within.
dropLocation: Quid Pro Quo, End Chest

name: Direwolf Belt
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Legendary Direbear Belt 

This belt is made of Direwolf hide, and can take quite a beating. Rumor has
it that some of the incredible ferocity of a Direwolf can still be found within.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Eerie Belt
description:
Once worn by Sanora, a dreaded Pale Master, this dark leather belt enhances
the power of the wearer, while creating in her a sense on unease.
dropLocation: Genesis Point, Any end chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Electric Haze
description:
This belt is studded with dozens of Mentau's purple lightning crystals energizing
the wearer and protecting them from harm.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Mentau 's chest

name: Epic Lion-headed Belt Buckle
description:
Tarnished by time and wear, the brass surface of this buckle is molded in the
shape of a roaring lion.
dropLocation: Epic version of Lion-headed Belt Buckle

name: Epic Purging the Pantheon
description:
This belt is covered with the holy symbols of many of the other deities, overlaid
with newer symbols of a strange, arcane nature. The large buckle is stamped
with an impression of the abbot's symbol.
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, Warded chest

name: Epic Sapphire Studded Buckles
description:
This belt buckle is emblazoned with several polished sapphires. They glow warmly
in the light.
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End Chest

name: Epic Siren's Belt
description:
This rare belt is enchanted with the protective magic of a water spirit and
is capable of defending the wearer from harm.
dropLocation: Epic version of Siren's Belt

name: Epic Snakeskin Belt
description: The fangs on this belt buckle are a little sharper than they need to be.
dropLocation: Epic version of Snakeskin Belt

name: Epic Spare Hand
description:
A belt with a remarkable augmentation: a clawed hand that extends from it and
will help you attack your foes and make tasks easier to perform.

name: Epic Trapsmith's Toolbelt
description: Various implements hang from this heavy leather belt.

name: Festering Mummy Wrappings
dropLocation: Search and Rescue, End chest

dropLocation: Toil and Trouble, end chest

dropLocation: Security Detail, End Chest

name: Legendary Buckle of Secrets
description:
This buckle conceals a small compartment, which could easily house small components,
hidden messages, or a small dose of poison.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, Lacheln 's chest (rare)

name: Legendary Buckle of Transformation
description:
When spun, this buckle releases its power into its bearer, granting them strength
and power.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Legendary Burnscar Sash
description: This belt is leather and has been branded with some unknown symbol.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Legendary Chain of Manacles
description:
This belt is made of several interlocking pairs of magical manacles, each containing
their own subtle, lawful magic.
dropLocation: Eye Know Whodunnit, End chest

name: Legendary Chains
description: Oppression will always fail, just as chains will always be broken.
dropLocation: Slave Pits of the Undercity, Small chest

name: Legendary Direbear Belt
description:
This belt is made of Direbear hide, and can take quite a beating. Rumor has
it that some of the incredible ferocity of a Direbear can still be found within.
dropLocation: Quid Pro Quo, End chest

name: Legendary Festering Mummy Wrappings
description: A length of cloth bandages previously used by an ancient mummy
dropLocation: Search and Rescue, End chest

name: Legendary Glittering Waistwrap
description: Every step you take causes the small bells on this belt to jingle.
dropLocation: Smash and Burn, End Chest

name: Legendary Green Steel Belt
description: A belt crafted from green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Jetscale Belt
description: The dark scales on this belt clatter as you walk.
dropLocation: Wish Upon a Card, end chest

name: Legendary Lion-headed Belt Buckle
description:
Tarnished by time and wear, the brass surface of this buckle is molded in the
shape of a roaring lion.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Lion-headed Belt Buckle

name: Legendary Many-Pouched Belt of the Healer
description:
The numerous pouches on this belt contain strange and wondrous components that
aid in both magical and mundane healing.
dropLocation: The Newcomers, end chest
_file: Legendary Many-Pouched Belt of the Healer.item

name: Legendary Miner's Reinforced Belt
description: Stone plates ring this belt, absorbing impact.
dropLocation: Ends and Means, end chest

name: Legendary Official Kobold Union Buckle
dropLocation: Sleeping with the Fishes, end chest

name: Legendary Outpost Sniper's Belt
description:
The weights secured in the pockets of this Dwarven belt are meant to level the
trejectory[sic] of any projectile launched by its user.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, End Chest

name: Legendary Plateshard Belt
description: This makeshift belt is fastened from the broken steel of other suits of armor.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Legendary Pyrefang's Collar
description: The fearsome Hound was no match for you.
dropLocation: One Dame Thing After Another, end chest

name: Legendary Rune-Sigiled Belt
description: The reflective sigils sewn into this belt absorb and redirect harmful curses.
dropLocation: Fresh-baked Dreams, End chest, Mill chest

name: Legendary Seaweed-woven Belt
description: Seaweed, when dried and woven together, can form a relatively strong canvas.
dropLocation: Whispers of Return, end chest

name: Legendary Shadow's Embrace
description:
You fasten the intricate buckle of this belt, and as it clicks into place your
moves somehow become more subtle - as though the belt has melded your form
with the shadows.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, End Chest

name: Legendary Silverthread Belt
description: These silver threads, woven together, amplify aligned magic.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, End chest

name: Legendary Siren's Belt
description:
This rare belt is enchanted with the protective magic of a water spirit and
is capable of defending the wearer from harm.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Siren's Belt

name: Legendary Snakeskin Belt
description: The fangs on this belt buckle are a little sharper than they need to be.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Snakeskin Belt

name: Legendary Strap of Savviness
description:
This belt has notes filled with formulae, diagrams, and other magical secrets
secured in its many hidden pockets.
dropLocation: Oghma's Song, end chest

name: Legendary Tangle of Wires
description:
This mess of wires seems to carry some form of arcane charge, in spite of their
frayed state.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part One), end chest

name: Legendary The Baron's Bandolier
description: The bandolier of the Baron's fallen body.
dropLocation: A Miner Sacrifice, end chest

name: Legendary Thrummingspark Cord
description: This is a fine silver chainmail belt. It hums with a rhythmic pulse.
dropLocation: Wrath of the Earth, End chest

name: Legendary Tunneler's Toolkit
description:
The aspiring tunnel rat or sneaky scamp need look no further than the tools
on this belt.
dropLocation: The Knife's Edge, end chest

name: Legendary Vistani Fighter's Sash
description:
This long cloth, worn at the waist, marks a member of the Vistani when they
go to war.
dropLocation: Into the Mists, End chest

name: Legendary Waistwrap of Wild Wisdom
description: A light cloth waistwrap for those headed out into the woods.
dropLocation: Death Hosts This Banquet, end chest

name: Lindal's Mighty Belt
description: The silver shields on this belt seem to imbue you with magical strength
dropLocation: Skeletons in the Closet, Free Yarrow optional chest

name: Lion-headed Belt Buckle
description:
Tarnished by time and wear, the brass surface of this buckle is molded in the
shape of a roaring lion.
dropLocation: Zawabi's Revenge, Raid Warded chest

name: Lorinthor's Belt
description:
Belts of this type were worn by members of the Knights of the Chalice. The markings
on this item indicate that it was worn by Lorinthor, a dedicated Knight and
hero to the people of Xen'drik.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Many-Pouched Belt of the Healer
description:
The numerous pouches on this belt contain strange and wondrous components that
aid in both magical and mundane healing.
dropLocation: The Newcomers, end chest

name: Mechanic's Belt
description:
This leather belt has a number of small pouches holding various tools. It was
worn by the master Mechanic, Rotas.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Miner's Reinforced Belt
description: Stone plates ring this belt, absorbing impact.
dropLocation: Ends and Means, end chest

name: Minotaur Hair Belt
description: A thick belt woven of coarse hair that increases its wearer's balance.
dropLocation: Gwylan's Stand, Crippler Bigfoot 's chest

name: Morah's Belt
description:
This thin leather belt is braided with scarves of many different colors. It
was worn by the famous street performer Morah when she disappeared through
a portal to Shavarath.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Morgana's Belt
description:
The dreaded Warpriest Morgana wore this belt in battle. Morgana is believed
to have left Stormreach to assist the Devil's forces in Shavarath.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, End chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Mystic Belt
description:
Ghola-Fan contracted a treasure seeker to bring him treasures from all over
Eberron. The origin of this piece is unknown because Ghola-Fan killed the treasure
seeker before he learned it. He quickly discovered that the belt would not
fit and tossed it into his vault.
dropLocation: Bring Me the Head of Ghola-Fan!, Treasure Room End Chest

name: Official Kobold Union Buckle
dropLocation: Sleeping with the Fishes, end chest

name: Ophael's Cincture
description:
The Commander dropped this belt before returning to her home plane. May she
never return.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Outpost Sniper's Belt
description:
The weights secured in the pockets of this Dwarven belt are meant to level the
trejectory[sic] of any projectile launched by its user.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, End Chest

name: Planar Gird
description:
This belt of interlocking silver disks is emblazoned with a mark of True Law.
Several pieces are bent and blistered from intense heat.
dropLocation: The Xorian Cipher, green key room chest

name: Plateshard Belt
description: This makeshift belt is fastened from the broken steel of other suits of armor.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Purging the Pantheon
description:
This belt is covered with the holy symbols of many of the other deities . The
large buckle is stamped with an impression of the Abbot's symbol.
dropLocation: Ascension Chamber, Raid Warded chest

name: Pyrefang's Collar
description: The fearsome Hound was no match for you.
dropLocation: One Dame Thing After Another, end chest

name: Rahkir's Sash
description:
This fine cloth sash courses with magical energy. It belonged to Rahkir, a famous
Archmage who disappeared while investigating a portal to Shavarath.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Rugged Belt
description: This leather belt appears to be well worn and used.
dropLocation: The Storehouse's Secret, End reward

name: Rune-Sigiled Belt
description: The reflective sigils sewn into this belt absorb and redirect harmful curses.
dropLocation: Fresh-baked Dreams, End Chest, Mill chest

in the light.
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End Chest

description: The fangs on this belt buckle are a little sharper than they need to be.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, end chest

name: Spare Hand (Level 11)
description:
A belt with a remarkable augmentation: a clawed hand that extends from it and
will help you attack your foes and make tasks easier to perform.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various challenge ingredients

description:
A belt with a remarkable augmentation: a clawed hand that extends from it and

name: Strap of Autumn Leaves
description: The sweet smell of the autumn wind follows you.
dropLocation: Fables of the Feywild, any chest

name: Strap of Savviness
description:
This belt has notes filled with formulae, diagrams, and other magical secrets
secured in its many hidden pockets.
dropLocation: Oghma's Song, end chest

name: Strap of Scale
description: A strip of Ancient Blue Dragonscales is set into this fine belt.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, warded chest

name: Tangle of Wires
description:
This mess of wires seems to carry some form of arcane charge, in spite of their
frayed state.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part One), end chest

name: Telvi's Sash
description:
This ornate sash is frigid to the touch. With the aid of this sash, Telvi, a
famous Water Savant, was able to create enough water to save several villages
from drought.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any end chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Thamor's Belt
description:
This leather belt was owned by Thamor the Earth Savant. It is acid etched with
flowing green arcane runes.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any Chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: The Baron's Bandolier
description: The bandolier of the Baron's fallen body.
dropLocation: A Miner Sacrifice, end chest

name: The Cornerstone Champion
description:
The Cornerstone is the largest arena in Sharn, and winning a bout is a surefire
way to attain fame and fortune.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, end chest

name: The Dreadward
description: This cloth belt will ward against evil energies.
dropLocation: The Hobgoblin Horde, end chest

name: The Unbreakable Cord
dropLocation: Relentless, end chest

name: Thrummingspark Cord
description: This is a fine silver chainmail belt. It hums with a rhythmic pulse.
dropLocation: Wrath of the Earth, End chest

name: Tokala's Belt
description:
Once worn by Tokala, a powerful Radiant Servant, this heavy belt is adorned
with symbols depicting the sun.
dropLocation: Genesis Point, Any end chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Trapsmith's Toolbelt
description: Various implements hang from this heavy leather belt.
dropLocation: Free Delera, End chest

name: Tunneler's Toolkit
description:
The aspiring tunnel rat or sneaky scamp need look no further than the tools
on this belt.
dropLocation: The Knife's Edge, end chest

name: Tunnelworm Champion's Belt
description:
Only the strongest Tunnelworm was allowed to wear this coveted belt, which provided
much needed comfort from the cold, dank sewer environment.
dropLocation: The Lost Seekers, End reward

name: Undeniable Truth
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Vistani Fighter's Sash
description:
This long cloth, worn at the waist, marks a member of the Vistani when they
go to war.
dropLocation: Into the Mists, End chest

name: Vorne's Belt
description:
This weathered leather belt is torn and tattered. The crude markings that cover
it declare that it was worn by the feared Occult Slayer, Vorne.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

description: A light cloth waistwrap for those headed out into the woods.
